message:
feat: add capability escrow gateway with challenge/sandbox routes and decision receipts

Implement comprehensive capability escrow infrastructure in the extension host
for controlling runtime privilege escalation through structured decision workflows:

- CapabilityEscrowRoute enum with Challenge and Sandbox paths for routing
  escalation requests through appropriate verification pipelines
- CapabilityEscrowState state machine (Requested → Challenged/Sandboxed →
  Approved/Denied/Expired) for tracking escalation lifecycle
- CapabilityEscrowRequest and CapabilityEscrowRecord structures for
  capturing request context, timing, and audit trail
- CapabilityEscrowDecisionReceipt with cryptographic signing for
  tamper-evident audit of privilege grant/deny decisions
- DenialReason::CapabilityEscrowPending variant for clean integration
  with existing denial tracking
- HostcallType::default_escrow_route() for per-hostcall routing defaults
- HostcallSinkPolicy with default implementation for extension-level
  hostcall filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
